FISHUT.Module.Name: Substances and Paraphernalia
FISHUT.Settings.EnforceParaphernalia.Hin: When on, substances with required paraphernalia cannot be consumed unless the actor possesses the required gear. When off, all substances consume freely.
FISHUT.Settings.StrictDaeRequirement.Nam: Block substances that require DAE when DAE is missing
FISHUT.Settings.StrictDaeRequirement.Hin: When on, a substance whose Active Effects are flagged as requiring DAE cannot be consumed unless the DAE module is active. When off (default), the substance is consumed but a warning is shown — its DAE-mode effects may silently fail to apply.
FISHUT.Settings.SuppressIntegrationWarni: When on, the ready-time notification listing recommended-but-missing modules is suppressed. Per-substance DAE warnings are unaffected.
FISHUT.Settings.Debug.Name: Debug logging
FISHUT.Settings.Debug.Hint: Print module-prefixed debug messages to the browser console. Warnings and errors are always shown.
FISHUT.Settings.AddictionPoisonedCouplin: Choose how addiction relates to the Poisoned condition. Linked-cascade: addiction also applies Poisoned, and curing Poisoned cures the addiction. Linked-isolated: addiction also applies Poisoned, but they're cleared separately. Independent: addiction never adds Poisoned. Changes only affect new applications.
Allow voluntary abstain on long rest
When on, actors with active withdrawal may attempt a Wisdom save during a long rest to skip an extra rest. Pass: -2 rests. Fail: normal -1 rest, no penalty.
FISHUT.Settings.DaeIntegration.Name: Wire into Dynamic Active Effects (DAE)
FISHUT.Settings.DaeIntegration.Hint: Disable to make this module ignore DAE even if it's installed. Suppresses DAE-aware effect detection and the missing-DAE warning.
FISHUT.Settings.MidiqolIntegration.Name: Wire into Midi-QoL
FISHUT.Settings.MidiqolIntegration.Hint: Disable to make this module ignore Midi-QoL even if it's installed.
FISHUT.Settings.TimesUpIntegration.Name: Wire into Times Up
FISHUT.Settings.TimesUpIntegration.Hint: Disable to make this module ignore Times Up even if it's installed.
FISHUT.Settings.TmfxIntegration.Name: Wire into Token Magic FX
FISHUT.Settings.TmfxIntegration.Hint: Disable to make this module ignore Token Magic FX even if it's installed.
FISHUT.Settings.ManageParaphernaliaSubty: Add, edit, or remove custom paraphernalia subtypes. Built-in subtypes ship with the module and cannot be removed.
FISHUT.ParaphernaliaManager.Intro: Author custom paraphernalia subtypes that authors can pick from on the Details tab. Built-in subtypes are listed below for reference and cannot be removed.
FISHUT.ParaphernaliaManager.EmptyHint: No custom subtypes yet. Click “Add subtype” to create one.
FISHUT.ParaphernaliaManager.Error.NotKeb: Row {index}: id must be lowercase kebab-case (e.g. rolled-leaf).
FISHUT.ParaphernaliaManager.Error.Collid: Row {index}: id collides with a built-in subtype.
FISHUT.ParaphernaliaManager.Error.Duplic: Row {index}: id is duplicated within the custom list.
FISHUT.Gating.Blocked.Title: Missing paraphernalia
FISHUT.Integrations.Missing.Notice: Substances and Paraphernalia recommends modules that aren't active: {missing}. Disable this notice in the module settings.
FISHUT.Integrations.RequiresDae.Warn: {item}: this substance has effects that require DAE. DAE isn't active — those effect modes may silently fail to apply.
FISHUT.Integrations.RequiresDae.Block: {item}: requires DAE, and DAE isn't active. Consumption blocked.
FISHUT.Addiction.SaveDialog.Title: Resist addiction to {item}
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.PassWithAdvantage: {actor} resisted the addictive pull of {item} (advantage from {source}).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.Fail: {actor} failed to resist {item} and gained the Addicted condition for {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.FailWithAdvantage: {actor} failed to resist {item} despite advantage from {source}; gained the Addicted condition for {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.PassWithBonus: {actor} resisted the addictive pull of {item} (+{bonus} from {source}).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.FailWithBonus: {actor} failed to resist {item} despite +{bonus} from {source}; gained the Addicted condition for {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.FailNoWithdrawal: {actor} failed to resist {item} and gained the Addicted condition.
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.FailNoWithdrawalWi: {actor} failed to resist {item} despite advantage from {source}; gained the Addicted condition.
{actor} failed to resist {item} despite +{bonus} from {source}; gained the Addicted condition.
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.Bypass: {actor}'s save against {item} addiction was bypassed by {paraphernalia}.
FISHUT.Addiction.Already.Extended: {actor} is already addicted to {item}; withdrawal extended to {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Already.Maintained: {actor} is already addicted to {item}; withdrawal remains at {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.RemoveAddiction.Title: Remove Addiction
FISHUT.RemoveAddiction.NoCandidates: {actor} has no addiction effects or withdrawal entries to remove.
FISHUT.RemoveTolerance.Title: Remove Tolerance
FISHUT.RemoveTolerance.NoCandidates: {actor} has no tolerance effects to remove.
FISHUT.RemoveOverdose.Title: Remove Overdose
FISHUT.RemoveOverdose.NoCandidates: {actor} has no overdose effects to remove.
FISHUT.RemoveWithdrawal.Title: Remove Withdrawal
FISHUT.RemoveWithdrawal.NoCandidates: {actor} has no withdrawal effects or entries to remove.
FISHUT.DragInventory.Title: Inject state — {item}
FISHUT.DragInventory.Body: Select the state to apply to {actor} from {item}.
FISHUT.DragInventory.Applied.Addicted: {actor} now addicted to {item}; withdrawal {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.DragInventory.Applied.Withdrawing: {actor} entered withdrawal from {item}; {rests} long rest(s) remaining.
FISHUT.SimulateDose.Title: Simulate dose — {item}
FISHUT.SimulateDose.AddictionState.Label: Pre-seeded state
FISHUT.SimulateDose.ReadySubtypes.Label: Ready paraphernalia
FISHUT.SimulateDose.Result.Title: Simulation result — {item}
FISHUT.LongRestAbstain.Title: Voluntary abstain
FISHUT.LongRestAbstain.Prompt: {actor} is in withdrawal from {item}. Attempt to abstain (Wis save DC {dc})?
FISHUT.LongRestAbstain.Intro: {actor} is in withdrawal from the substances below. Check any to attempt a Wisdom save to abstain — pass advances withdrawal by an extra rest, fail leaves the standard 1-rest progress unchanged.
FISHUT.LongRestAbstain.Pass: {actor} successfully abstained from {item} (DC {dc}); withdrawal advances 2 long rests.
FISHUT.LongRestAbstain.Fail: {actor} failed to abstain from {item} (DC {dc}); standard 1 long rest of progress.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Field.Category.Label: Category
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Field.WithdrawalEffect: Don't duplicate poisoned (disadv on attacks/checks). Escalate: exhaustion, disadv on saves, speed reduction, stat penalty.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.VignetteColor.Label: Withdrawal Vignette Color
FISHUT.DetailsTab.VignetteColor.Hint: Screen-edge color shown to a player while their actor is in withdrawal from this substance. Owner-only. Captured onto the AE at application time, so editing it here later won't recolor existing withdrawals.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Overdose.Enabled: Roll for overdose on each consumption
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Overdose.Tooltip: Shown on the chat card when overdose triggers. Describe the immediate effect; mechanics live on the marker AE.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Field.OverdoseEffect.T: Active Effect cloned onto the actor when overdose triggers. Author its Changes on the Effects tab to model the consequences (e.g. exhaustion, hp loss, status conditions).
Active Effect cloned onto the actor on the first save pass; subsequent passes increment its `flags.stacks` counter. Surface the tolerance flag block (kind, substanceId, addictionDcBump, etc.) as editable Changes on the Effects tab.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Field.Subtype.Label: Subtype
FISHUT.DetailsTab.EffectPicker.Dissociat: Dissociate from this slot (effect remains on the item)
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Bypass.None.Hint: No save modifier on this item.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Bypass.GrantButton: Grant save modifier via Active Effect
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Bypass.AppliesTo.Label: Applies to
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Bypass.Bonus.Label: Bonus
FISHUT.Coupling.Mode.LinkedIsolated: Linked (isolated) — both apply, but removal is independent
FISHUT.Coupling.Mode.Independent: Independent — addiction does not apply poisoned
